>> What are some of the things that annoy

>> Um I hate two things about AI. One is
that I think it is making people dumber
because they're choosing not to think
and they are letting AI make their

like it's just AI slop. And the biggest

it's because this is this is this is so
they'll do this repetition of sentence

are you trying to say and then just say
that.

so I think the the biggest shift that

put out job requirements the way we

oh, we need an X. But the thing is it's
the titles matter significantly less and
less as so much of a role is really just
like a circle with six or seven
